ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., Health Post, Primary Health Centre) */,
  "community" TEXT /* Community where the facility is located */,
  "ward" TEXT /* Ward where the facility is located */,
  "management" TEXT /* Management type (e.g., public, private) */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Full address of the facility */,
  "facility_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the facility */,
  "facility_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "facility_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the facility offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., maternal health delivery, emergency transport) */,
  "service_available" INTEGER /* Whether the service is available at the facility */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "service_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the service */,
  "service_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staffing" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff type */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the facility where the staff work */,
  "staff_type" TEXT /* Type of staff (e.g., nurses, doctors) */,
  "num_fulltime" INTEGER /* Number of full-time staff */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff */,
  "staff_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the staff */,
  "staff_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the staff in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staffing_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure type */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the facility with the infrastructure */,
  "infrastructure_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., electricity, improved water supply) */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the infrastructure is available at the facility */,
  "infrastructure_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the infrastructure */,
  "infrastructure_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the facility surveyed */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "gps" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the facility */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey */,
  "survey_results" TEXT /* Results of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the facility with the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., medical equipment, furniture, vehicles) */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the equipment is available at the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, facility manager, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Type of facility (e.g., Health Post, Primary Health Centre)
Community where the facility is located
Ward where the facility is located
Date when the facility was established

Whether the service is available at the facility
Unique identifier for each staff type
ID of the facility where the staff work
Experience of the staff in years
Unique identifier for each infrastructure type
ID of the facility with the infrastructure
Type of infrastructure (e.g., electricity, improved water supply)
Whether the infrastructure is available at the facility
ID of the facility with the equipment
Type of equipment (e.g., medical equipment, furniture, vehicles)
Whether the equipment is available at the facility
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, facility manager, data analyst)
ID of the role with the permission
